components.name: Editor
components.purpose: The writing surface. Contenteditable, autosaves to the store, renders markdown back to HTML on blur for read mode. Owns title (h1) + body, the saved/idle indicator, and the FloatingToolbar mount. The content surface that the page tint frames (floating mode) or merges into (flat mode).

components.name: FloatingToolbar
components.purpose: Selection-triggered formatting toolbar (bold, italic, code, link, headings). Dark-on-light inverted surface that floats above the selection. Uses raw rgba overlays — flagged in roadmap.md for --overlay-* tokenization at PR C time.

components.name: Sidebar
components.purpose: Left rail with hanging-icon nav (NavSection + Collapse + NavRow). Lists drafts (synthetic folder) and attached repos with their .md files. Sits directly on the page tint (no fill, no border) per the surface model. Search + new-draft entry point.

components.name: ColorRail
components.purpose: Signature element. Vertical 12px strip on the right edge of the content surface — HSL gradient marker + 8 preset swatches + manual color picker. Drives --page-tint. The user-controlled tone axiom (#3) made visible.

components.name: AttachPopover
components.purpose: Popover for attaching the current draft to a repo + folder path. Anchored to its trigger, closes on Escape / outside click / item activation. Candidate for Mini Popover archetype migration in PR C.

components.name: AddRepoModal
components.purpose: Modal dialog for adding a new repo source (label + path). Traps focus, closes on Escape, restores focus on close. Candidate for Mini Dialog archetype migration in PR C.

components.name: Toast
components.purpose: ToastProvider + useToast hook. Bottom-anchored inverted dark surface with an Undo affordance (used by draft delete). Pause-on-hover deferred to roadmap.md. Slated for Mini Toast archetype replacement in PR C while keeping the <ToastProvider> API surface.

components.name: DevPanel
components.purpose: Bottom-right developer panel for live-toggling surface posture (floating vs flat), section spacing, and other in-progress knobs. Persisted to localStorage. Production-gated (dev builds only). The dogfooding surface for the surface-posture open axiom.

components.name: icons
components.purpose: SVG icon set. Stroke-based, currentColor, 1.5 stroke-width. Single source for all chrome icons — Folder, File, Search, Palette, Close, Chevron, etc.
